nasb.text: Then that lawless one will be revealed whom the Lord will slay with the breath of His mouth and bring to an end by the appearance of His coming;

esv.text: And then the lawless one will be revealed, whom the Lord Jesus will kill with the breath of his mouth and bring to nothing by the appearance of his coming.

cnv.text: 那時，這不法的人必要顯露出來。主耶穌要用自己口中的氣除掉他，以自己再來所顯現的光輝消滅他。

ccb.text: 他就会出现，但主耶稣会用自己口中的气毁灭他，用从天降临的荣光废掉他。

csbs.text: 然后这不法之人要被显露出来。主耶稣要以自己口中的气杀掉他，藉着自己来临的显现除去他。
